prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, controlled pacing with deliberate cuts and extended holds.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Warm light catches two pale carved dice and the edge of a stone ledge, while the robed figures behind sink into deep blue and brown shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
Two small carved bone dice rest at the corner of a pale stone ledge, their black pips catching the light. Behind them the robed lower bodies of two figures in deep-blue and ochre-gold drapery recede into shadow, a weathered hand at the lower-left. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the two dice on the stone ledge, robed figures behind.

Cut to mid framing — the corner of the pale stone ledge with the two dice.

Cut to macro detail — the two carved bone dice and their black pips.

Cut to insert — the pale stone ledge edge and its grain.

Cut to insert — the weathered hand at the lower-left.

Cut to lower framing — the base of the pale stone pedestal.

Cut to insert — the deep-blue and ochre drapery folds behind.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the two dice on the stone ledge.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Cold chance over a certainty foretold.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

beats.description: Start on full composition — two dice on the stone ledge, robed figures behind
Cut to mid framing — corner of the pale stone ledge with the two dice
Cut to macro detail — the two carved bone dice and their black pips
Cut to insert — pale stone ledge edge and its grain
Cut to insert — weathered hand at the lower-left
Cut to lower framing — base of the pale stone pedestal
Cut to insert — deep-blue and ochre drapery folds behind
Return to full composition, end hold on the two dice on the stone ledge
